sustained.name: RuView
sustained.desc: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
sustained.descZh: π RuView ： WiFi DensePose将商品WiFi信号转化为实时人体姿态估计、生命体征监测和存在检测—所有这些都无需单个视频像素。

sustained.name: OpenSandbox
sustained.desc: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.
sustained.descZh: OpenSandbox是用于AI应用的通用沙盒平台，提供多语言SDK、统一的沙盒API和Docker/Kubernetes运行时，适用于编码代理、GUI代理、代理评估、AI代码执行和RL培训等场景。

newcomers.desc: CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go. It integrates 100+ security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, role-based testing with predefined security roles, a skills system with specialized testing skills, and comprehensive lifecycle management capabilities.

newcomers.name: mcp-for-beginners
newcomers.desc: This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration.
newcomers.descZh: 本开源课程通过.NET、Java、TypeScript、JavaScript、Rust和Python中的真实世界跨语言示例，介绍了模型上下文协议(MCP)的基础知识。它专为开发人员设计，专注于构建从会话设置到服务编排的模块化、可扩展且安全的人工智能工作流程的实用技术。

weeklyTop.name: seomachine
weeklyTop.desc: A specialized Claude Code workspace for creating long-form, SEO-optimized blog content for any business. This system helps you research, write, analyze, and optimize content that ranks well and serves your target audience.
weeklyTop.descZh: 一个专门的Claude Code工作区，用于为任何企业创建长篇、SEO优化的博客内容。该系统可帮助您研究、撰写、分析和优化排名良好的内容，并为您的目标受众提供服务。

darkHorse.name: RuView
darkHorse.desc: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
darkHorse.descZh: π RuView ： WiFi DensePose将商品WiFi信号转化为实时人体姿态估计、生命体征监测和存在检测—所有这些都无需单个视频像素。
